{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032201354136968D73541913484C55"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7592469414560432958","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，好沙雕哈哈哈哈"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767763969,"group_id":"7555147451993181208","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没有谁是一座孤岛，每本书都是一个世界","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxRSTr/oCc20MdeioPulEi3HZEQGs/x+fGT6oxJzy8wv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b8b9abc62b404fdf8626b954e9641e48~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709467&x-signature=WjMSE%2FR1vx3qUXzsy7XNgOlCfj0%3D","user_id":"1015574005295144","user_name":"香远益清的莲藕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1015574005295144","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7555147451993181208","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿+沙雕+女主无敌+不憋屈+男主存在感非常弱(早死）+不雌竞】
柳期被人围剿鱼死网破自爆时被路过的系统333阴差阳错绑定，333保证在柳期更正完小世界男女主之后就帮助柳期完成一个愿望，于是柳期开始了她的旅行。
    玛丽苏校园文里柳期上来就赠送四巴掌，成功改正了男女主的认知，从此主角们都老实了，世界也和平了。
    霸总追妻文里柳期灌输给女主的思想让女主直接化身女强人，从根源开始拒绝了霸总，霸总连追妻都轮不上，而柳期在霸总每次有当不法分子的苗头时站出来武力镇压。
    白月光挖肾文里柳期直接报警一条龙服务，拿着霸总家里做的各种罪行把霸总和白月光送进了监狱。从此女主安全了，男主也活着。
    替身文学中柳期当上了白月光，看着把她当成play一环的男女主，柳期解除商业联姻，男主被踢出继承人的位置真的净身出户了，从此男女主过着鸡飞狗跳的平淡生活。
    系统333：“宿主，下次打人的时候轻点，你把人打死，任务就完不成了。”
    柳期：“我尽量。”
然后一脚踹飞了男主。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/98c75944d9003b6c337eef19685d474b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"芽咔辣嘿","author_id":"","book_id":"7555147451993181208","book_name":"武力改正主角三观","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7555147993423282712","read_count":"4","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"145436"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"71","tags":"快穿,现代言情,校园,系统,无敌,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/98c75944d9003b6c337eef19685d474b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779298541&x-signature=nKp98xXZVEubnonSEsw0RFVTKvQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2100486555840378","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032201354136968D73541913484C55"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":
